policies.title: Data Minimization Protocol
policies.summary: Mandatory minimization rules for all operational stores, with schema review gates before deployment.

policies.title: Sovereign Data Residency Standard
policies.summary: Defines residency boundaries, replication rules, and cross-border transfer controls for citizen records.

policies.title: Retention & Disposition Schedule
policies.summary: Default retention periods for operational, transactional, and audit records with exception workflow.

assessments.title: Q2 Privacy Impact Review
assessments.summary: Review of new registry schema changes against data minimization, purpose limitation, and retention mandates.

assessments.title: Cross-Border Transfer Assessment
assessments.summary: Assessment of third-party analytics dependencies and proposed safeguards for sovereign data exports.

assessments.title: Algorithmic Ethics Audit
assessments.summary: Audit of scoring, verification, and ranking algorithms used in registry and service delivery.

retention.title: Citizen Identity Records
retention.summary: Active identity records require 7-year retention with anonymized archival after sunset.

retention.title: Operational Incident Logs
retention.summary: Incident logs are retained for 3 years and then securely deleted unless flagged for ongoing legal proceedings.

retention.title: Financial Transaction Ledger
retention.summary: Financial records require 10-year retention with sealed exception status due to cross-jurisdictional settlement requirements.

pillars.title: Data Sovereignty
pillars.summary: Citizen-owned data with consent-based sharing and portable export rights.

pillars.title: Ethical Stewardship
pillars.summary: Algorithmic transparency, bias audits, and fairness review for all automated decisions.

pillars.title: Retention Discipline
pillars.summary: Time-bounded retention schedules with automated purge and audit trails.
